按物业查看 NVR、通道、异常和实时并发，默认只做按需拉流。: View NVRs, channels, alerts, and sessions by property. Streams start on demand.
维护 NVR 品牌、型号、内网地址、通道数和在线状态。: Manage NVR brand, model, LAN address, channels, and status.
维护通道名称、区域、主/子码流编码和码率。: Manage channel name, area, main/sub codec, and bitrate.
统一管理海康 RTSP 主/子码流模板，避免直接明文散落配置。: Centralize Hikvision RTSP main/sub templates and avoid scattered plaintext settings.
第一版保留关键控制项：并发、自动释放、ZLM 地址和播放令牌。: Initial controls: sessions, auto release, ZLM URL, and playback tokens.
ZLM secret 仅后端使用: Use ZLM secret only on backend
按物业和摄像头范围授权，ZLM secret 不暴露给前端。: Authorize by property and camera scope. Never expose the ZLM secret to the frontend.
记录谁在什么时间看了哪个摄像头，以及失败原因。: Log who viewed which camera and why failures occurred.
控制轮巡并发，不一次拉满所有物业。: Control patrol sessions without pulling all properties at once.
检查 NVR 连通性、RTSP 拉流和 ZLM 代理状态。: Check NVR connectivity, RTSP pull, and ZLM proxy status.
可在主码流和子码流之间切换，页面关闭会释放播放会话。: Switch main/sub streams. Closing the page releases sessions.
播放错误：视频加载被中断: Playback error: video loading was interrupted
播放错误：流地址无法访问，请检查 ZLM 地址、端口和跨域配置: Playback error: stream URL unreachable. Check ZLM URL, port, and CORS.
播放错误：浏览器无法解码当前视频流，请检查 H.264 子码流参数: Playback error: browser cannot decode the stream. Check H.264 sub-stream settings.
播放错误：当前流地址或编码不受浏览器支持，请检查 HLS 分片和 H.264 子: Playback error: URL or codec unsupported. Check HLS segments and H.264 sub-stream.
播放错误：浏览器 MSE 无法解码当前流，请确认子码流为 H.264/AAC，或: Playback error: MSE cannot decode. Confirm H.264/AAC sub-stream or try HLS.
播放错误：当前浏览器不支持该流编码: Playback error: codec unsupported by this browser
播放启动失败：浏览器阻止了自动播放，请点击画面后重试: Playback failed: autoplay blocked. Click the video to retry.
播放启动失败：流地址或编码不受当前浏览器支持: Playback failed: URL or codec unsupported by this browser
播放启动失败：请检查流地址、ZLM 端口和跨域配置: Playback failed: check stream URL, ZLM port, and CORS
码流元数据异常：未读取到有效视频分辨率，请检查 NVR 子码流编码参数: Stream metadata error: no valid resolution. Check NVR sub-stream codec settings.
码流分辨率异常：{{width}}x{{height}}，请在 NVR 将子码流: Stream resolution error: {{width}}x{{height}}. Set NVR sub-stream to H.264 and at least 320x180.
当前浏览器不支持 HLS 播放: This browser does not support HLS playback
当前浏览器不支持 HTTP-FLV 播放: This browser does not support HTTP-FLV playback
拉流失败，请检查后端日志或 ZLM 状态: Stream pull failed. Check backend logs or ZLM status.
